Comment: Potential false positive on Next.js chunk hash-like numbers
Potential false positive on UI copy containing SQL keywords
Third-party (e.g. Cloudflare rocket-loader.js) — Permissions-Policy not set by app
Third-party or edge-cached assets — X-Content-Type-Options not controlled by app
Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy on Cloudflare cdn-cgi/* scripts — not controllable in repo
HSTS on responses served only at Cloudflare edge without origin headers
Timestamp disclosure in JSON/metadata — common, low risk
Cache / storable content heuristics — often noisy on SPAs
Cache-control re-examine — noisy on static edge responses
